template.Subject: Alibaba Cloud – HKT Account Migration Request - {{CustomerName}}
template.BodyHTML:
Dear supports,























We would like to migrate the following Alibaba Cloud account to the HKT master account.
 
Customer's Information:1. HKT Alibaba Cloud Account ID  : 58921034209156552. Customer's Alibaba Cloud Account ID (UID)  : {{AccountID}}3. Customer's Alibaba Cloud root login email address : {{AdminEmail}}4. Company Name  : {{CustomerName}}5. Effective Date  : Please refer to Order Form
 
 Thank You

template.Subject: < Welcome Letter > Multi-Cloud Services  - {{CustomerName}} ( Alibaba Cloud UID : {{AccountID}} )
template.BodyHTML:
Dear Valued Customer,


 
We are writing to express our gratitude for your HKT Multi-Cloud subscription and welcome you onboard as a new customer.
 
 
Details of the service are as follows :

Subscribed Service  :    Multi-Cloud Service - Alibaba Cloud
 Customer Name:   {{CustomerName}}Service No.:   {{ServiceNumber}}Tenant ID:   {{TenantID}}UID:   {{AccountID}}
 Login Information  :
 URL:   https://account.alibabacloud.com/login/login.htmLogin ID:   {{AdminEmail}}Password:   (owned by customer)
 

Should you have any inquiries, please call our Customer Service Hotlines 2283-6880 or by email  hktcloudems@pccw.com
 
Thank you for choosing HKT as your service provider.
 

 
Yours sincerely,
HKT Multi-Cloud service

template.Subject: <Alibaba Cloud> New Account Creation – {{CustomerName}}
template.BodyHTML:
Dear Customer,


We have sent you an invitation from Alibaba Cloud to create and register an account {{AdminEmail}} .

Please refer to the attached document titled "Alibaba Cloud End User Account Registration Onboarding Guide" for detailed instructions on how to complete the account registration process.

Kindly note that the link provided in the email will remain valid for 15 days from the date of receipt. If the link expires, please feel free to contact us, and we will be happy to resend it to you.
Thank You

template.Subject: Activation for Multi-Cloud Services - {{CustomerName}} (AWS ID {{AccountID}}) {{ServiceDeskNo}}
template.BodyHTML:
Dear Customer

Invitations have been sent out. Would you please accept the invitation within 3 days and let me know once accepted for proceed the next step. Thanks.

-------------------------------------------------------------------

Please follow the instructions below to change the consolidated billing:

1.      Sign in and access theAWS Management Console and find theAWS Organizations service in the search bar by using AWS ID {{AccountID}} root accounts.

https://console.aws.amazon.com/organizations/




2.  On the right side of the screen, select the invitationView 1 invitation


3.      Click and accept the invitation.


You can follow the attached instructions to accept the invitation.
 
 If you are unable to accept invitations. Please follow the step in Attachment to check if any existing organization linked then remove the account from the old organization
 
Please kindly notify us once you have accepted the invitation. Thank you!

template.Subject: <Microsoft Azure> Invitation to establish The Microsoft Reseller Relationship to HKT - {{CustomerName}}
template.BodyHTML:
Dear Customer,







We hope this email finds you well. We would like to proceed with transferring your Microsoft 365 tenant and Azure subscription from your current partner to HKT (Hong Kong Telecommunications Limited).
HKT is pleased to offer our services as your Microsoft Cloud Solution Provider for your Microsoft Cloud account.
To accept the invitation, please follow these two steps:
Step 1: Ensure your customer profile is complete by checking here:
Link:   Customer Profile
Step 2: After customer profile is complete (may take up to max 5 minutes to refresh after profile is updated), click the following link to accept this invitation and authorize Hong Kong Telecommunications (HKT) Limited to be your Microsoft Cloud Solution Provider and accept the Microsoft Customer Agreement:
Link:   Accept Invitation
Note: This process will not establish an Admin relationship with HKT. A user with Global Admin permissions is required to accept this relationship.
Additional Partner Information:Existing Domain Name: [Existing Domain Name]Microsoft ID: {{MicrosoftID}}
 
Thank you for your cooperation.
If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out.
template.VariableList: ContactEmail; AMEmail; ASMEmail; CustomerName; Existing Domain Name; MicrosoftID

warnings: Unknown variable in list: "Existing Domain Name"

template.BodyHTML:
Dear Customer,
 
We are delighted to inform you that your Azure subscription transfer request has been successfully completed. We have located your Azure Subscription within our partner center.
 
To proceed further, it is necessary for you to remove the delegated admin privileges granted to the previous partner in both the Microsoft 365 admin center and the Azure subscription. Once you have completed this step, kindly notify us, and we will send you an invitation to request delegated admin privileges on our behalf. We will also provide detailed instructions on how to add Azure RBAC permissions to our account.
Please find attached document comprising four parts, which will guide you through the process step by step. By following these instructions, you will be able to complete the necessary tasks smoothly.
 Remove the pervious partner delegated admin privilegesRemove the pervious partner Azure RBAC accessAccept our Granular Delegated Admin Privileges (GDAP) requestReinstate Azure RBAC access on your Azure subscription (Powershell)
 
Should you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to reach out to me.
Thank you for your cooperation.

Dear Customer,
 
We have confirmed that Hong Kong Telecommunications (HKT) Limited has been added as your Microsoft Cloud Solution Provider for your Microsoft 365 tenant. We will proceed with transferring the Azure subscription from your current partner to us.
 
To initiate this transfer, we will create a transfer request via the Microsoft Partner Center. In order to complete the process, we kindly request your assistance in contacting your current partner and providing us with the following information:
 
 1. Current Partner Name
 2. Current Partner Microsoft ID
